title: Fix Dark Mode CSS for Formula/Code Editor in Field Definition
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing field definitions in dark mode, I want the formula/code editor to render with proper dark mode styling, so that the code content is readable.
description:
The formula/code editor display in the field definition section does not render correctly in dark mode. The code block styling clashes with the dark background.

## Fix
Apply dark mode CSS override to the code/formula display in the field definition view.
acceptance_criteria: Formula/code editor renders with proper dark mode styling
Code text is readable against the dark background
No visual regression in light mode
ux_changes: Dark mode CSS applied to the formula/code editor in the field definition view for proper readability.
implementation_notes: Minor CSS tweak to the master stylesheet for the code display element in the field definition view.
comment_summary: Developer fixed on the development branch.
